item.title: yasserbdj96 / hiphp
item.description:
Desc: The BackDoor of HIPHP gives you the power to control websites based on PHP using HTTP/HTTPS protocol. By sending files, tokens and commands through port 80's POST/GET method, users can access a range of activities such as downloading and editing files. It also allows for connecting to Tor networks with password protection for extra security.
Lang: Python
Star: 140
